title: Lag Clear
description: This mod is designed for Minecraft version 1.21.11 and automatically deletes unnecessary items that fall to the ground every 5 minutes. The mod is in the beta phase.
body:
# Lag clear

_This mod was created to remove unnecessary or excess items that have fallen to the ground. Personally, I dislike items remaining after cutting down trees or after creatures die outside, and I believe that single-player players like me, rather than those playing online, also dislike this situation. Although I have only made it for version 1.21.11 at the moment, I will optimise this mod for lower versions in the future._

![Befor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21f486e3563f8994040fd72c14ebd35d6308cf50.png)![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23e91e0a16e44fe6fb50eebde624e6ca16d55052.png)

## About the Mod
- Only wipes up items that have fallen or been thrown on the floor
- This happens every five minutes.
- For those who don't want to wait, or if it doesn't work, you can use the **/lagclear ** command even if cheats are disabled.
- Currently, only a Turkish warning message is available, but I will add many languages in the next update.

## Important!!

_** I'm still new to modding, so any feedback you provide regarding errors or omissions is very important to me. Enjoy your games, everyone. **_
##  Update Notes
### Changes
-  Config loading
- Dynamic cleaning interval
- Command system update
- Countdown system

** Installing an update right after the first file might seem a bit odd, but there are important changes. The most significant one is that the periodic cleanup wasn't working, and I fixed that. There is now a config file, I made a few important changes to the command system, and I added a countdown timer. **

##  Command System Update
-   /Lagclear :  Cleans instantly
- /lagclear config interval [Time] : Allows you to set the cleaning interval in minutes
- /lagclear config enable  : Turns on the mode
- /lagclear config disable : Turns off the mode
- /lagclear config status  :  It shows the status of the module and how often it performs cleaning.

  _** That's all for now. I wish you all good luck with your games 👌. **_
